title: thymus serpyllum var. benacensis
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. benacensis, commonly known as Benacian Thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus serpyllum plant, native to the Benaco region in Italy. This perennial herb has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum var. benacensis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to improve digestion and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Benacian Thyme can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used externally to treat skin issues or internally to promote overall health and well-being.
